TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tai'an Tai'an a sakuwan ku Miaoli. kumud nu kalesakan, 602.88 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 524.2 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 59.69 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 4,814 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,508 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,986 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 83% (Atayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Atayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Tai'an mala walu a cuwen atu 16 ku niyazu'. kina 16 a niyazu'sa, B'anux , Maylubung , Mepuwal , Mabanan , Malabang , Suru , Pakwari , Gali-hwan , Matabalay , Mabatuan , Tabilas , Maibagah , Sakuhan , Swasiq , Maytayax , Quwis awi' . Tai'an Tai'an . Tai'an itida i Taywan Miw-li-kin wali timulan a niyadu'an nu san-ti yincumin a niyadu'an, amisan sibiyaw tu Na-cuan a niyadu', Sin-cu-kin Wu-fun niyadu' , timulan midadapi tu Tacun-se'Hepin a niyadu' , nutipan atu Cuelan-cen , Tahu a niyadu' , Shitan niyadu' mababiyaw, u Mewli-kin ku satabakiay nu lala'a nu kakitidaan, tademaw han saadidi'ay nu sin-sen a niyadu'an, u ahebal nu lala' nuheni makaala tu mala tuluay tu cacay. benacadan nu angangan han u Taywan yincumin Tayalu a tademaw , atu layak nu ngayngayngayan. nina Tai'an wincun micidek tu ku silaculan nu wancuna, sisa kasinganganan tu "Tayalu wincun a niyadu'an" han kuni panganganan. likisi itini nikuwanan nu Dipun a zitay, nina niyadu' u Sincu-cuo ta'hu-cun ce-sia a kitidaan , nikudan nu nikalepacaw sumad han tu santi yincumin a niyadu'an, naw Mewli-kin Taan-niyadu'a niyadu'an, nika atu Tacun-kin Taan-niyadu' "aydaay a Tacu-se Taan-niyadu'" malicad ku ngangan, i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan walu (8) a bulad sumad han tu aydaay a Tai'an katukuh ayda. zu'cihek a niyadu'an Tai'an cengelan lalangawan a kitidaan Tai'an aadihan tuni kasilacan nu tuud Selin niyadu' , sipakayda i Cuo-lan niyadu' miduduc tu Ta-an a sawac nu tepala a dadan micumud, sayaway makatukuh i Taycu-se a Takuwan-niyaduan, milakuuyd tu Se-lin a cascasan makatukuh tu Se-lin-niyaduan , ninaniyadu' a paya nu silusi a dadan u pabuy ku kulit tu sacumud tinaniyaduan. su'wun nina niyadu' angangan u sawac a Ta-an sauwac ,Wun-suy sauwac atu Ta-fu sauwac , Wunsua sauwac nu tapang i Taiyalu Mi'-yun niyadu' talakaw han tusa a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2,618) a kunce a ngabulan buyu' nutipan timulan nu masananggayya a buyu' nu dihep, kapulung nu misilelilay a nanum namakayda i Dun-si-suy-san a silsil nu lalitemuhan a Dun-si-suy sawac misudikud pasayda i nutipan, u wuin-suy atu Ta-fu sauwac nu kapulungan. . Taan sauwac angangan i Sia-san-abuyu'an nu Tapa'cun buyu' nutipan, pasaida i nutipan kuni pisilesile katukuh i Tun-yung buyu'an Palu' atu kacacepaan nu Ma-ta-la sauwac kalalitemuh han, pangangan han tu Ta-an sacac, makayda kunipi silesile nu nanum i Sai-cen,Ta-an, Sanpi a niyadu'an, Se-lin niyadu'an, mala Mawli-kin , Taicun-se nu kala litemuhan. Mawli-kan Cuolan-niyadu' Cuolan papahanhanan a aidangan "Cuo-lan papahanhanan a aidangan" itida i Ta-an sauwac masa likelunay a lala' nu masaenalay a masakayakaya' a lalalalaan, amis madapi tu Li-i banawan, nina niyadu' naw u sikawaway tu uciya, kama, laya', ngipi ku kawaw, nikudan satu caay kakapah ku aca' nu kama atu kasicilekayan nu kaliwmahan, ayda u kaliwmahan nu heni u balu, pakunida hananay a lami', bangsisay a lutuk, nipatatules tu laya, kiyabes, latak ku tadapalumaan nuheni. ayda a mihcaan u papahanhanan nu aaidangan ku liwmahan nu tataydan a midang, kataydaan a midang mapulung atu tataydaan midang nu umah atu aidangan, misakapah tu tataydaaan a midang. suyeun cascas atu tabakiay nu ba'tu a diheb tabakiay nu ba'tu a diheb itida i Wun-sua sauwac nu pabawan, hatidaay nu ahebal nu sauwac yadah ku tabakiay adidiay atu caaya kalecad nu i labuay nu ba'tu, pasayda miadih mahicaay kiya ku nikasilac nu bangcal, bangcal sa ataydan miadih. namakayda i tabakiay nu ba'tu adiheb katukuh i Suy-wun cascas maka alatu tusaay a bataan nu lawat a tatukiyan, amica ku nika bangcal nu tataydaan, nika u tataydaan muculil u masa likelikelunnay a dadan ku yadah,saka, aw tuwasu'a laic ku sapikayakay tu talakaway a tataydaan a laad, sakamusa anu inai' ku katinengay tayda i buyu han piadihi anu tayda i buyu'. Mawli-kin Tai'an Atayalu yincumin lalangawan a sakaudip nu kakitidaan "Atayalu yincumin lalangawan a lalaculan nu kakitidaan" kakitidaan makaala tu cacay. enem pitu a kubu (1.67), Mawli-kin sifu manglay mipulung tu Taywan wuncun tu sakasilacul atu Atayalu a lalangawan, itida patideng tu " Tayalu aadihan tu tuud"atu " Ta-pila-se wuncun aidangan", sapisingaan tu cacuduh han tu Tayalu lalangawan a anganganan nu cacuduhan. "Tayalu aadihan tu tuud" yadah ku aadih tu cancanan nu nipisilac, sapaadih idaw ku Tayan niyaduan nika bulawan atu aadihan tu nika babenisan tu cudad, tawyaay a Tayalu nu lalangaw nu tawyaay a kakawawsan nu lalangawan a patineng misiwkay atu sasing. idaw ku nipilekakawaw tu nituktukan tu kasuy, nisangan tu uway a cancanan nu tuudan, nitenunan tu dikuc atu tubtub nu nisangaan aadihan tu cancanan anisilacan, atu nipatideng tu nulabiiay a kilangkilangan nu sasalamaan a kitidaan, sumamaday anikaudipan a dayday nu uli' auk nisangaan tu luma' a kakitidaan, papilihida tu taydaay nu midangay a tademaw milihida tu kakawaw nuheni atu miliheda tu Tayalu nu dayday nu hican nu nika udipan nuheni. . idaw kunipi kiyaku tu kawaw nuheni tu " Tapila-se wuncun kungyun", taydaay nu tademaw amidang caay paacai kuni pisengel tu kuku i wuncun, pilipayan hni idaw ku nipaimung tu palaw atu kakanen nu patiyamay nu yungcumin, nu taydaay a midangay nu tademawan taneng miadih tu nipaimung atu palaw nuheni sa taneng milihida tu kakanen nu niyaduay a asu'ay nu kakanen, imahini micuduh patinaku atu midayday tu Tayalu nu lalangawan, kya yadah ku matinengay tu sakatayda i Tayalu amidang nu yadahay a tademaw, kya mapalekal ku sakaudip nu itidaay a tademawan. demiad demiad nu nuyadu' han kalacalecaledesan, kadihkuwan atu yadah nu udad, udad namakayda i dadipasan haymaw sa pasayda i bayu' amawada', udadan han itida i limaay a bulad katukuh siwaay a bulad.

Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **% (atajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atajar~…ĺ ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan tai Ē~ °an mar~…ĺa war~…ĺu a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, b Ē~ °anu* , majr~…ĺubuŇč , m…ôpuwar~…ĺ , mabanan , mar~…ĺabaŇč , suru , pakwari , gar~…ĺi-ńßwan , matabar~…ĺaj , mabatuan , tabir~…ĺas , maibagańß , sakuńßan , swasi* , majtaja* , *uwis awi Ē~ ° . tai Ē~ °an tai Ē~ °an . tai Ē~ °an itida i tajwan miw-r~…ĺi-kin war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ °an nu san-ti jin ¶umin a nijadu Ē~ °an, ¶una, sisa kasiŇčaŇčanan tu "tajar~…ĺu win ¶un a nijadu Ē~ °an" ńßan kuni paŇčaŇčanan. r~…ĺikisi itini nikuwanan nu dipun a zitaj, nina nijadu Ē~ ° u sin ¶u- ¶uo ta Ē~ °ńßu- ¶un ¶…ô-sia a kitidaan , nikudan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw sumad ńßan tu santi jin ¶umin a nijadu Ē~ °an, naw m…ôwr~…ĺi-kin taan-nijadu Ē~ °a nijadu Ē~ °an, nika atu ta ¶un-kin taan-nijadu Ē~ ° "ajdaaj a ta ¶u-s…ô taan-nijadu Ē~ °" dadan u pabuj ku kur~…ĺit tu sa ¶umud tinanijaduan. su Ē~ °wun nina nijadu Ē~ ° aŇčaŇčan u sawa ¶ a ta-an sauwa ¶ ,wun-suj sauwa ¶ atu ta-fu sauwa ¶ , wunsua sauwa ¶ nu tapaŇč i taijar~…ĺu mi Ē~ °-jun r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu masa…ônar~…ĺaj a masakajakaja Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺaan, amis madapi tu r~…ĺi-i banawan, nina nijadu Ē~ ° naw u sikawawaj tu u ¶ija, kama, r~…ĺaja Ē~ °, Ňčipi ku kawaw, nikudan satu ¶aaj kakapańß ku a ¶a Ē~ ° nu kama atu kasi ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan nu kar~…ĺiwmańßan, ajda u kar~…ĺiwmańßan nu ńß…ôni u bar~…ĺu, pakunida ńßananaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, baŇčsisaj a r~…ĺutuk, nipatatur~…ĺ…ôs tu r~…ĺaja, kijab…ôs, r~…ĺatak ku tadapar~…ĺumaan nuńß…ôni. ajda a mińß ¶aan u papańßanńßanan nu aaidaŇčan ku r~…ĺiwmańßan nu tatajdan a midaŇč, katajdaan a midaŇč mapur~…ĺuŇč atu tatajdaan midaŇč nu umańß atu aidaŇčan, misakapańß tu tatajdaaan a midaŇč. suj…ôun ¶as ¶as atu tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu a dińß…ôb tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu a dińß…ôb itida i wun-sua sauwa ¶ nu pabawan, ńßatidaaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ jadańß ku tabakiaj adidiaj atu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu i r~…ĺabuaj nu ba Ē~ °tu, pasajda miadińß mańßi ¶aaj kija ku nikasir~…ĺa ¶ nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa atajdan miadińß. namakajda i tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu adińß…ôb katukuńß i suj-wun ¶as ¶as maka ar~…ĺatu tusaaj a bataan nu r~…ĺawat a tatukijan, ami ¶a ku nika baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu tatajdaan, nika u tatajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ u masa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunnaj a dadan ku jadańß,saka, aw tuwasu Ē~ °a r~…ĺai ¶ ku sapikajakaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a tatajdaan a r~…ĺaad, sakamusa anu inai Ē~ ° ku katin…ôŇčaj tajda i buju ńßan piadińßi anu tajda i buju Ē~ °. mawr~…ĺi-kin tai Ē~ °an atajar~…ĺu jin ¶umin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sakaudip nu kakitidaan "atajar~…ĺu jin ¶umin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu kakitidaan" kakitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj. …ôn…ôm pitu a kubu (*.**), mawr~…ĺi-kin sifu maŇčr~…ĺaj mipur~…ĺuŇč tu tajwan wun ¶un tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ atu atajar~…ĺu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, itida patid…ôŇč tu " tajar~…ĺu aadińßan tu tuud"atu " ta-pir~…ĺa-s…ô wun ¶un aidaŇčan", sapisiŇčaan tu ¶a ¶uduńß ńßan tu tajar~…ĺu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčanan nu ¶a ¶uduńßan. "tajar~…ĺu aadińßan tu tuud" jadańß ku aadińß tu ¶an ¶anan nu nipisir~…ĺa ¶, sapaadińß idaw ku tajan nijaduan nika bur~…ĺawan atu aadińßan tu nika bab…ônisan tu ¶udad, tawjaaj a tajar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu tawjaaj a kakawawsan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a patin…ôŇč misiwkaj atu sasiŇč. idaw ku nipir~…ĺ…ôkakawaw tu nituktukan tu kasuj, nisaŇčan tu uwaj a ¶an ¶anan nu tuudan, nit…ônunan tu diku ¶ atu tubtub nu nisaŇčaan aadińßan tu ¶an ¶anan anisir~…ĺa ¶an, atu nipatid…ôŇč tu nur~…ĺabiiaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu sasar~…ĺamaan a kitidaan, sumamadaj anikaudipan a dajdaj nu ur~…ĺi Ē~ ° auk nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kakitidaan, papir~…ĺińßida tu tajdaaj nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺińßida tu kakawaw nuńß…ôni atu mir~…ĺińß…ôda tu tajar~…ĺu nu dajdaj nu ńßi ¶an nu nika udipan nuńß…ôni. . idaw kunipi kijaku tu kawaw nuńß…ôni tu " tapir~…ĺa-s…ô wun ¶un kuŇčjun", tajdaaj nu tad…ômaw amidaŇč ¶aaj paa ¶ai kuni pis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu kuku i wun ¶un, pir~…ĺipajan ńßni idaw ku nipaimuŇč tu par~…ĺaw atu kakan…ôn nu patijamaj nu juŇč ¶umin, nu tajdaaj a midaŇčaj nu tad…ômawan tan…ôŇč miadińß tu nipaimuŇč atu par~…ĺaw nuńß…ôni sa tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺińßida tu kakan…ôn nu nijaduaj a asu Ē~ °aj nu kakan…ôn, imańßini mi ¶uduńß patinaku atu midajdaj tu tajar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kja jadańß ku matin…ôŇčaj tu sakatajda i tajar~…ĺu amidaŇč nu jadańßaj a tad…ômaw, kja mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku sakaudip nu itidaaj a tad…ômawan. d…ômiad d…ômiad nu nujadu Ē~ ° ńßan kar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan, kadińßkuwan atu jadańß nu udad, udad namakajda i dadipasan ńßajmaw sa pasajda i baju Ē~ ° amawada Ē~ °, udadan ńßan itida i r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß siwaaj a bur~…ĺad.
S.FORM: Tai'an Tai'an a sakuwan ku Miaoli. kumud nu kalesakan, 602.88 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 524.2 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 59.69 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 4,814 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,508 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,986 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 83% (Atayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Atayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Tai'an mala walu a cuwen atu 16 ku niyazu'. kina 16 a niyazu'sa, B'anux , Maylubung , Mepuwal , Mabanan , Malabang , Suru , Pakwari , Gali-hwan , Matabalay , Mabatuan , Tabilas , Maibagah , Sakuhan , Swasiq , Maytayax , Quwis awi' . Tai'an Tai'an . Tai'an itida i Taywan Miw-li-kin wali timulan a niyadu'an nu san-ti yincumin a niyadu'an, amisan sibiyaw tu Na-cuan a niyadu', Sin-cu-kin Wu-fun niyadu' , timulan midadapi tu Tacun-se'Hepin a niyadu' , nutipan atu Cuelan-cen , Tahu a niyadu' , Shitan niyadu' mababiyaw, u Mewli-kin ku satabakiay nu lala'a nu kakitidaan, tademaw han saadidi'ay nu sin-sen a niyadu'an, u ahebal nu lala' nuheni makaala tu mala tuluay tu cacay. benacadan nu angangan han u Taywan yincumin Tayalu a tademaw , atu layak nu ngayngayngayan. nina Tai'an wincun micidek tu ku silaculan nu wancuna, sisa kasinganganan tu "Tayalu wincun a niyadu'an" han kuni panganganan. likisi itini nikuwanan nu Dipun a zitay, nina niyadu' u Sincu-cuo ta'hu-cun ce-sia a kitidaan , nikudan nu nikalepacaw sumad han tu santi yincumin a niyadu'an, naw Mewli-kin Taan-niyadu'a niyadu'an, nika atu Tacun-kin Taan-niyadu' "aydaay a Tacu-se Taan-niyadu'" malicad ku ngangan, i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan walu (8) a bulad sumad han tu aydaay a Tai'an katukuh ayda. zu'cihek a niyadu'an Tai'an cengelan lalangawan a kitidaan Tai'an aadihan tuni kasilacan nu tuud Selin niyadu' , sipakayda i Cuo-lan niyadu' miduduc tu Ta-an a sawac nu tepala a dadan micumud, sayaway makatukuh i Taycu-se a Takuwan-niyaduan, milakuuyd tu Se-lin a cascasan makatukuh tu Se-lin-niyaduan , ninaniyadu' a paya nu silusi a dadan u pabuy ku kulit tu sacumud tinaniyaduan. su'wun nina niyadu' angangan u sawac a Ta-an sauwac ,Wun-suy sauwac atu Ta-fu sauwac , Wunsua sauwac nu tapang i Taiyalu Mi'-yun niyadu' talakaw han tusa a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2,618) a kunce a ngabulan buyu' nutipan timulan nu masananggayya a buyu' nu dihep, kapulung nu misilelilay a nanum namakayda i Dun-si-suy-san a silsil nu lalitemuhan a Dun-si-suy sawac misudikud pasayda i nutipan, u wuin-suy atu Ta-fu sauwac nu kapulungan. . Taan sauwac angangan i Sia-san-abuyu'an nu Tapa'cun buyu' nutipan, pasaida i nutipan kuni pisilesile katukuh i Tun-yung buyu'an Palu' atu kacacepaan nu Ma-ta-la sauwac kalalitemuh han, pangangan han tu Ta-an sacac, makayda kunipi silesile nu nanum i Sai-cen,Ta-an, Sanpi a niyadu'an, Se-lin niyadu'an, mala Mawli-kin , Taicun-se nu kala litemuhan. Mawli-kan Cuolan-niyadu' Cuolan papahanhanan a aidangan "Cuo-lan papahanhanan a aidangan" itida i Ta-an sauwac masa likelunay a lala' nu masaenalay a masakayakaya' a lalalalaan, amis madapi tu Li-i banawan, nina niyadu' naw u sikawaway tu uciya, kama, laya', ngipi ku kawaw, nikudan satu caay kakapah ku aca' nu kama atu kasicilekayan nu kaliwmahan, ayda u kaliwmahan nu heni u balu, pakunida hananay a lami', bangsisay a lutuk, nipatatules tu laya, kiyabes, latak ku tadapalumaan nuheni. ayda a mihcaan u papahanhanan nu aaidangan ku liwmahan nu tataydan a midang, kataydaan a midang mapulung atu tataydaan midang nu umah atu aidangan, misakapah tu tataydaaan a midang. suyeun cascas atu tabakiay nu ba'tu a diheb tabakiay nu ba'tu a diheb itida i Wun-sua sauwac nu pabawan, hatidaay nu ahebal nu sauwac yadah ku tabakiay adidiay atu caaya kalecad nu i labuay nu ba'tu, pasayda miadih mahicaay kiya ku nikasilac nu bangcal, bangcal sa ataydan miadih. namakayda i tabakiay nu ba'tu adiheb katukuh i Suy-wun cascas maka alatu tusaay a bataan nu lawat a tatukiyan, amica ku nika bangcal nu tataydaan, nika u tataydaan muculil u masa likelikelunnay a dadan ku yadah,saka, aw tuwasu'a laic ku sapikayakay tu talakaway a tataydaan a laad, sakamusa anu inai' ku katinengay tayda i buyu han piadihi anu tayda i buyu'. Mawli-kin Tai'an Atayalu yincumin lalangawan a sakaudip nu kakitidaan "Atayalu yincumin lalangawan a lalaculan nu kakitidaan" kakitidaan makaala tu cacay. enem pitu a kubu (1.67), Mawli-kin sifu manglay mipulung tu Taywan wuncun tu sakasilacul atu Atayalu a lalangawan, itida patideng tu " Tayalu aadihan tu tuud"atu " Ta-pila-se wuncun aidangan", sapisingaan tu cacuduh han tu Tayalu lalangawan a anganganan nu cacuduhan. "Tayalu aadihan tu tuud" yadah ku aadih tu cancanan nu nipisilac, sapaadih idaw ku Tayan niyaduan nika bulawan atu aadihan tu nika babenisan tu cudad, tawyaay a Tayalu nu lalangaw nu tawyaay a kakawawsan nu lalangawan a patineng misiwkay atu sasing. idaw ku nipilekakawaw tu nituktukan tu kasuy, nisangan tu uway a cancanan nu tuudan, nitenunan tu dikuc atu tubtub nu nisangaan aadihan tu cancanan anisilacan, atu nipatideng tu nulabiiay a kilangkilangan nu sasalamaan a kitidaan, sumamaday anikaudipan a dayday nu uli' auk nisangaan tu luma' a kakitidaan, papilihida tu taydaay nu midangay a tademaw milihida tu kakawaw nuheni atu miliheda tu Tayalu nu dayday nu hican nu nika udipan nuheni. . idaw kunipi kiyaku tu kawaw nuheni tu " Tapila-se wuncun kungyun", taydaay nu tademaw amidang caay paacai kuni pisengel tu kuku i wuncun, pilipayan hni idaw ku nipaimung tu palaw atu kakanen nu patiyamay nu yungcumin, nu taydaay a midangay nu tademawan taneng miadih tu nipaimung atu palaw nuheni sa taneng milihida tu kakanen nu niyaduay a asu'ay nu kakanen, imahini micuduh patinaku atu midayday tu Tayalu nu lalangawan, kya yadah ku matinengay tu sakatayda i Tayalu amidang nu yadahay a tademaw, kya mapalekal ku sakaudip nu itidaay a tademawan. demiad demiad nu nuyadu' han kalacalecaledesan, kadihkuwan atu yadah nu udad, udad namakayda i dadipasan haymaw sa pasayda i bayu' amawada', udadan han itida i limaay a bulad katukuh siwaay a bulad.
S.PHON: tai Ē~ °an tai Ē~ °an a sakuwan ku miaor~…ĺi. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti ***.* km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **% (atajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atajar~…ĺ ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan tai Ē~ °an mar~…ĺa war~…ĺu a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, b Ē~ °anu* , majr~…ĺubuŇč , m…ôpuwar~…ĺ , mabanan , mar~…ĺabaŇč , suru , pakwari , gar~…ĺi-ńßwan , matabar~…ĺaj , mabatuan , tabir~…ĺas , dadan u pabuj ku kur~…ĺit tu sa ¶umud tinanijaduan. su Ē~ °wun nina nijadu Ē~ ° aŇčaŇčan u sawa ¶ a ta-an sauwa ¶ ,wun-suj sauwa ¶ atu ta-fu sauwa ¶ , wunsua sauwa ¶ nu tapaŇč i taijar~…ĺu mi Ē~ °-jun nipatatur~…ĺ…ôs tu r~…ĺaja, kijab…ôs, r~…ĺatak ku tadapar~…ĺumaan nuńß…ôni. ajda a mińß ¶aan u papańßanńßanan nu aaidaŇčan ku r~…ĺiwmańßan nu tatajdan a midaŇč, katajdaan a midaŇč mapur~…ĺuŇč atu tatajdaan midaŇč nu umańß atu aidaŇčan, misakapańß tu tatajdaaan a midaŇč. suj…ôun ¶as ¶as atu tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu a dińß…ôb tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu a dińß…ôb itida i wun-sua sauwa ¶ nu pabawan, ńßatidaaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu sauwa ¶ jadańß ku tabakiaj adidiaj atu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu i r~…ĺabuaj nu ba Ē~ °tu, pasajda miadińß mańßi ¶aaj kija ku nikasir~…ĺa ¶ nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa atajdan miadińß. namakajda i tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tu adińß…ôb katukuńß i suj-wun ¶as ¶as maka ar~…ĺatu tusaaj a bataan nu r~…ĺawat a tatukijan, ami ¶a ku nika baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu tatajdaan, nika u tatajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ u masa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunnaj a dadan ku jadańß,saka, aw tuwasu Ē~ °a r~…ĺai ¶ ku sapikajakaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a tatajdaan a r~…ĺaad, sakamusa anu inai Ē~ ° ku katin…ôŇčaj tajda i buju ńßan piadińßi anu tajda i buju Ē~ °. mawr~…ĺi-kin tai Ē~ °an atajar~…ĺu jin ¶umin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sakaudip nu kakitidaan "atajar~…ĺu jin ¶umin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu kakitidaan" kakitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj. …ôn…ôm pitu a kubu (*.**), mawr~…ĺi-kin sifu maŇčr~…ĺaj mipur~…ĺuŇč tu tajwan wun ¶un tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ atu atajar~…ĺu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, itida patid…ôŇč tu " tajar~…ĺu aadińßan tu tuud"atu " ta-pir~…ĺa-s…ô wun ¶un aidaŇčan", sapisiŇčaan tu ¶a ¶uduńß ńßan tu tajar~…ĺu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčanan nu ¶a ¶uduńßan. "tajar~…ĺu aadińßan tu tuud" jadańß ku aadińß tu ¶an ¶anan nu nipisir~…ĺa ¶, sapaadińß idaw ku tajan nijaduan nika bur~…ĺawan atu aadińßan tu nika bab…ônisan tu ¶udad, tawjaaj a tajar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu tawjaaj a kakawawsan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a patin…ôŇč misiwkaj atu sasiŇč. idaw ku nipir~…ĺ…ôkakawaw tu nituktukan tu kasuj, nisaŇčan tu uwaj a ¶an ¶anan nu tuudan, nit…ônunan tu diku ¶ atu tubtub nu nisaŇčaan aadińßan tu ¶an ¶anan anisir~…ĺa ¶an, atu nipatid…ôŇč tu nur~…ĺabiiaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu sasar~…ĺamaan a kitidaan, sumamadaj anikaudipan a dajdaj nu ur~…ĺi Ē~ ° auk nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kakitidaan, papir~…ĺińßida tu tajdaaj nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw mir~…ĺińßida tu kakawaw nuńß…ôni atu mir~…ĺińß…ôda tu tajar~…ĺu nu dajdaj nu ńßi ¶an nu nika udipan nuńß…ôni. . idaw kunipi kijaku tu kawaw nuńß…ôni tu " tapir~…ĺa-s…ô wun ¶un kuŇčjun", tajdaaj nu tad…ômaw amidaŇč ¶aaj paa ¶ai kuni pis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu kuku i wun ¶un, pir~…ĺipajan ńßni idaw ku nipaimuŇč tu par~…ĺaw atu kakan…ôn nu patijamaj nu juŇč ¶umin, nu tajdaaj a midaŇčaj nu tad…ômawan tan…ôŇč miadińß tu nipaimuŇč atu par~…ĺaw nuńß…ôni sa tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺińßida tu kakan…ôn nu nijaduaj a asu Ē~ °aj nu kakan…ôn, imańßini mi ¶uduńß patinaku atu midajdaj tu tajar~…ĺu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kja jadańß ku matin…ôŇčaj tu sakatajda i tajar~…ĺu amidaŇč nu jadańßaj a tad…ômaw, kja mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku sakaudip nu itidaaj a tad…ômawan. d…ômiad d…ômiad nu nujadu Ē~ ° ńßan kar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan, kadińßkuwan atu jadańß nu udad, udad namakajda i dadipasan ńßajmaw sa pasajda i baju Ē~ ° amawada Ē~ °, udadan ńßan itida i r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß siwaaj a bur~…ĺad.
